## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue. Please also include relevant motivation and context. List any dependencies that are required for this change.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change

Please delete options that are not relevant.

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Style/UI change
- [ ] Internationalization (i18n)
- [ ] Code refactoring

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have added comments to my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly (if applicable)
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have tested my changes on both desktop and mobile viewports
- [ ] I have tested my changes in both dark and light themes
- [ ] I have tested my changes in both Chinese and English languages
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes

## Screenshots (if applicable)

Add screenshots to help explain your changes, especially for UI modifications.

## Additional Notes

Add any other context about the pull request here.
